---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for AI Workspace Gateway.
title: 'feat: [Short summary of feature]'
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## 🙋 Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is. (e.g., *I'm frustrated when I try to do X because Y...*)

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature or capability you would like added to the gateway. Detail how the user would interact with it and how it should behave.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, packages, or workarounds you have considered.

---

## 📋 Additional Context or Use Cases

Add any other context, mockup drawings, or user flows that help explain the requirements for your feature request.

---

## 🏗️ Impact Area

Select which parts of the workspace gateway this feature affects:

- [ ] `packages/core` (Orchestration, memory, tools)
- [ ] `packages/database` (Local SQLite / encryption / migration)
- [ ] `packages/providers` (LLM adapters)
- [ ] `apps/pwa` (Desktop PWA client)
- [ ] `apps/telegram` (Telegram bot or Mini App client)
- [ ] Documentation or configuration
